action.reasoning: Observation: Training completed but Val AP=0.0261 is terrible (random baseline level). Loss displayed as 0.0000 likely due to formatting. LR dropped from 0.0009 to 0.00001 in 5 epochs (way too aggressive). Analysis: Model is severely undertrained. Need higher initial LR (1e-3), cosine annealing instead of aggressive decay, lower dropout (0.3 vs 0.5), and many more epochs. Also need proper loss logging. Decision: Rewrite train.py with better hyperparameters, train 30 epochs, and submit eval.
